name: AltEnergy Acquisition Corp
summary: . Introduction AltEnergy Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed in February, 2021, as a Delaware corporation for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar transaction with one or more businesses, which we refer to throughout this Annual Report on Form 10-K as our initial business combination.
